item.title: User Guide: Running Hermes via Docker
item.description:
User Guide: Running Hermes via Docker

Running Hermes Agent in Docker and using Docker as a terminal backend
item.content:encoded:
User Guide: Running Hermes via Docker

Running Hermes Agent in Docker and using Docker as a terminal backend

item.title: BrainDB
item.description:
BrainDB

An “LLM wiki” upgraded to a real database — typed entities, graph relations, HTTP API, and a built-in natural-language agent.
item.content:encoded:
BrainDB

An “LLM wiki” upgraded to a real database — typed entities, graph relations, HTTP API, and a built-in natural-language agent.

item.title: PGWeb

PGWeb

Cross-platform client for PostgreSQL databases.

PGWeb

item.title: Looksyk

Looksyk

Looksyk - A markdown centric, fast and local personal knowledge platform

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KTT12YQDD3FGFWP39YFQCENC
item.description: I keep seeing these references to MCP server of the #Grist changelog, but where is the full MCP server documentation? Where’s the official one, at least? #GetGrist
item.content:encoded: I keep seeing these references to MCP server of the #Grist changelog, but where is the full MCP server documentation? Where’s the official one, at least? #GetGrist

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KTRJAB5SX9F5DRTSQY2J5DJ4
item.description:
Claude Fable is not “slightly more expensive” — it’s a premium tier.

API pricing per 1M tokens:

Fable: $10 input / $50 output Opus: $5 input / $25 output Sonnet: $3 input / $15 output

So Fable is 2× Opus and about 3.33× Sonnet. For most coding/finance/reporting workflows, Sonnet still feels like the default; Opus for hard tasks; Fable only when it materially reduces turns or rework.
item.content:encoded:
Claude Fable is not “slightly more expensive” — it’s a premium tier.

API pricing per 1M tokens:

Fable: $10 input / $50 output Opus: $5 input / $25 output Sonnet: $3 input / $15 output

So Fable is 2× Opus and about 3.33× Sonnet. For most coding/finance/reporting workflows, Sonnet still feels like the default; Opus for hard tasks; Fable only when it materially reduces turns or rework.

item.title: Why Does Hermes Use So Many More Tokens Than Claude Code? : r/hermesagent
item.description:
Why Does Hermes Use So Many More Tokens Than Claude Code? : r/hermesagent

Reddit is where millions of people gather for conversations about the things they care about, in over 100,000 subreddit communities.

item.title: LeafWiki
item.description:
LeafWiki

LeafWiki - Self-hosted wiki. Single Go binary, SQLite, Markdown on disk. No external database required.
item.content:encoded:
LeafWiki

LeafWiki - Self-hosted wiki. Single Go binary, SQLite, Markdown on disk. No external database required.

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KT3CE0J0J8BH1PV6JHCHKCNV
item.description:
Jollibee just got demoted from the MSCI Standard Index to Small Cap. My portfolio got the same treatment. At least we’re consistent. 🍗📉

My average: ₱183. Current: ~₱134. That’s a ~27% discount I didn’t ask for.

MSCI effective date: June 1. So the index exclusionary is officially behind us. Now we wait for the chicken to fly again.
item.content:encoded:
Jollibee just got demoted from the MSCI Standard Index to Small Cap. My portfolio got the same treatment. At least we’re consistent. 🍗📉

My average: ₱183. Current: ~₱134. That’s a ~27% discount I didn’t ask for.

MSCI effective date: June 1. So the index exclusionary is officially behind us. Now we wait for the chicken to fly again.
